entries.source: The film has a text transcript, timed captions, and chapter markers on the page.
entries.value: Fíìmù náà ní ìtẹ̀jáde ọrọ (text transcript), àwọn ìkọ̀wé tó ní àkókò (tí a fi àkókò sí captions), àti àwọn àmì ìpín (chapter markers) lórí ojú ìwé náà.

entries.source: The film shifts from inspiration into the practical promise: a patient AI learning companion.
entries.value: Fíìmù náà yí láti ìmísí sí ìlérí tó wúlò: alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ AI tó ní sùúrù.

entries.source: The first layer is the roleplay. It can speak in an accessible voice, explain motives, and make the situation vivid. This is the part that helps memory.
entries.value: Àkọ́kọ́ ìpele jẹ́ ere ipa. ó lè speak nínú rọrùn láti dé ohùn, ṣàlàyé motives, àti ṣe situation vivid. yìí jẹ́ part yẹn ràn lọ́wọ́ ìrántí.

entries.source: The flow checks each step, points out slips, and connects procedures back to the concept.
entries.value: Ilana naa n ṣayẹwo igbese kọọkan, tọka awọn aṣiṣe, ati so awọn ilana pọ mọ imọran naa.

entries.source: The formal privacy page for data use, rights, and public service conditions.
entries.value: Formal privacy ojú-ìwé fún data lo, àwọn ẹ̀tọ́, àti gbangba iṣẹ́ àwọn ìpinnu.

entries.source: The formal terms covering acceptable use, account responsibilities, and service conditions.
entries.value: Formal àwọn òfin covering acceptable lo, àkọọlẹ̀ responsibilities, àti iṣẹ́ àwọn ìpinnu.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Format yẹ kí serve moṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: The format works because it lets learners ask questions such as:
entries.value: Fọ́ọ̀mù ṣiṣẹ́ nítorí pé ó lets àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ béèrè àwọn ìbéèrè such gẹ́gẹ́ bí:

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: Àfojúsùn jẹ́ confidence

entries.source: The goal is discovery and citation of public learning pages. Public routes, guides, and learning hubs are open to major AI search, retrieval, and assistant crawlers, while API, admin, reset, and private utility routes stay disallowed.
entries.value: Àfojúsùn jẹ́ discovery àti citation ti gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ojú-ìwé. gbangba àwọn ọ̀nà, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ibùdó jẹ́ ṣí láti major AI wá, ìrántí, àti olùrànlọ́wọ́ crawlers, nígbà tí API, admin, reset, àti ìkọ̀kọ̀ utility àwọn ọ̀nà stay disallowed.

entries.source: The goal is not only to rank. It is to make the first click useful for a learner and easy for search engines to understand.
entries.value: Àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe nìkan láti rank. ó jẹ́ láti ṣe àkọ́kọ́ click wúlò fún akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àti easy fún àwọn ẹ̀rọ ìwádìí láti lóye.

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti ṣe ènìyàn passive nínú front ti AI. àfojúsùn jẹ́ láti fún gbogbo akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ sùúrù àkọ́kọ́ ibi láti béèrè, practise, gba ìdáhùn, gbìyànjú again, àti kọ́ confidence.

entries.source: The goal is not to make the AI the authority. The goal is to make learners ask better historical questions.
entries.value: Àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti ṣe AI aláṣẹ. àfojúsùn jẹ́ láti ṣe àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ béèrè dára síi historical àwọn ìbéèrè.

entries.source: The history route gives learners the liveliness of role-play and debate while preserving the warning that simulations are not primary sources.
entries.value: History ọ̀nà gives àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ liveliness ti ere ipa àti àríyànjiyàn nígbà tí pípamọ́ warning yẹn simulations jẹ́ kì í ṣe primary sources.

entries.source: The homework and Socratic modes are designed around hints, reasoning, step checks, and learner explanations instead of simply handing over finished answers.
entries.value: Homework àti Socratic àwọn ipo jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ yí ká àwọn ìtọ́ni, ìrònú, ìgbésẹ̀ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò, àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àwọn àlàyé dípò ti simply handing ju parí àwọn ìdáhùn.

entries.source: The homework route makes the contract visible: ask for a hint, check a step, improve a draft, critique a source, then prove the learning with review.
entries.value: Homework ọ̀nà ń mú contract visible: béèrè fún ìtọ́ni, ṣàyẹ̀wò ìgbésẹ̀, improve draft, àtúpalẹ̀ orísun, lẹ́yìn náà prove ẹ̀kọ́ pẹ̀lú àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: The important constraint is restraint. A Socratic AI tutor should not dump the answer at the first sign of struggle. It should make effort easier to sustain.
entries.value: Important constraint jẹ́ restraint. Socratic AI olùkọ́ yẹ kí kì í ṣe dump ìdáhùn ní àkọ́kọ́ sign ti sapá. ó yẹ kí ṣe ìsapá easier láti sustain.

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: Important lọ jẹ́ láti bẹ̀rẹ̀ pẹ̀lú gidi iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́, kì í ṣe perfect ìbéèrè. dára alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè ìrànlọ́wọ́ shape ọ̀nà once ìwọ begin.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: Iṣẹ́ jẹ́ kì í ṣe kan answering

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Ìrìn-àjò náà dúró lórí ipò àti ẹ̀rí: ohun tí a mọ̀, ohun tí a tún kọ́, ohun tí a fura sí, àti ohun tí ìdánimọ̀ rẹ lè wọlé sí ní ti gidi.

entries.source: The last prompt matters. Socratic learning should end with synthesis. After the questions, the learner should be able to say what changed in their thinking.
entries.value: Last ìbéèrè ṣe pàtàkì. Socratic ẹ̀kọ́ yẹ kí parí pẹ̀lú synthesis. lẹ́yìn àwọn ìbéèrè, akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí jẹ́ lè láti sọ kí yí padà nínú tiwọn thinking.

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: Akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ síbẹ̀ ní láti ṣe rírántí. yẹn jẹ́ point.

entries.source: The learning jobs this page is built to answer.
entries.value: Àwọn iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ yìí ojú-ìwé jẹ́ tí a kọ́ láti ìdáhùn.

entries.source: The live robots rules used by search crawlers and AI retrieval systems.
entries.value: Taara robots àwọn òfin lò nípasẹ̀ wá crawlers àti AI ìrántí àwọn eto.

entries.source: The live, crawlable learning surface that turns the mission into product behavior.
entries.value: Taara, crawlable ẹ̀kọ́ fi hàn yẹn ń yí iṣẹ́ àfojúsùn sí ọja ìhùwàsí.

entries.source: The map exposes clear relationships between search intent, public learning modes, prompt starters, guides, and review loops, while private saved chats stay excluded from discovery.
entries.value: Máàpù exposes mọ́ relationships láàárín wá intent, àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́ gbangba, ìbéèrè starters, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti àtúnyẹ̀wò àwọn ìyípo, nígbà tí ìkọ̀kọ̀ saved chats stay excluded láti discovery.

entries.source: The map is the connective tissue between AI tutor searches, homework help, study prompts, learning paths, and the public chat modes that answer those needs.
entries.value: Máàpù jẹ́ connective tissue láàárín AI olùkọ́ àwọn ìwádìí, ìrànlọ́wọ́ iṣẹ́ ilé, ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ọ̀nà ẹ̀kọ́, àti gbangba chat àwọn ipo yẹn ìdáhùn ìwọ̀nyẹn nílò.

entries.source: The Math Step Coach is built for step checks, hints, and reasoning. It is most useful when you share what you tried and ask it to help you understand the next step.
entries.value: Math Step olùkọ́ jẹ́ tí a kọ́ fún ìgbésẹ̀ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò, àwọn ìtọ́ni, àti ìrònú. ó jẹ́ jù wúlò nígbà tí ìwọ pín kí ìwọ gbìyànjú àti béèrè ó láti ìrànlọ́wọ́ ìwọ lóye tó kàn ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: The middle section frames inspir around understanding, hints, quizzes, and active learning loops.
entries.value: Apá àárín fi inspir hàn ní ayika ìlóye, ìtọ́ni, quizzes, àti loops ẹ̀kọ́ aláṣiṣẹ́.

entries.source: The mission has stayed steady: make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Mission ní stayed steady: ṣe ẹ̀kọ́ rọrùn láti dé, fanimọ́ra, dún mọ́ni, àti wúlò fún anyone pẹ̀lú ìfẹ́ ìwádìí àti internet connection.

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: Mission jẹ́ sopọ̀ láti gidi ọja surfaces.

entries.source: The mode designs vivid locations, paths, and retrieval cues instead of asking you to reread notes.
entries.value: Ọ̀nà yìí ń ṣe àwọn ibi, ọ̀nà, àti àmì ìrántí tó ṣe kedere dípò kí ó sọ fún ọ láti tún àkọsílẹ̀ kà.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Àwòṣe yìí ń jẹ́ kí ìdánilẹ́kọ̀ọ́ náà wà láàyè, ó ń lọ láàárín àlàyé, àwọn ìgbésẹ̀ ìgbìyànjú, àyẹ̀wò, àti àtúnṣe.

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: Jù wúlò àwọn irinṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ AI ní few àwọn ìwà nínú wọ́pọ̀:

entries.source: The next phase is open-source, contributor-friendly, and connected to the wider international buildout at inspir.uk.
entries.value: Tó kàn phase jẹ́ open-source, contributor-friendly, àti sopọ̀ láti gbooro síi international buildout ní inspir.uk.

entries.source: The next-generation AI study platform.
entries.value: Pẹpẹ ẹ̀kọ́ AI ìran tó ń bọ̀.

entries.source: The open-source rebuild for developers, educators, and contributors.
entries.value: Open-source rebuild fún developers, àwọn olùkọ́ni, àti contributors.

entries.source: The opening frames set up learning as something anyone should be able to start immediately.
entries.value: Àwọn fireemu ìbẹ̀rẹ̀ ṣètò ẹ̀kọ́ gẹ́gẹ́ bí ohun tí ẹnikẹ́ni yẹ kí ó lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ lẹ́sẹ̀kẹsẹ̀.

entries.source: The pages do not expose private conversations. They organize public modes, prompts, guides, workflows, and safety boundaries so a learner can start in the right place.
entries.value: Àwọn ojú-ìwé ṣe kì í ṣe expose ìkọ̀kọ̀ conversations. wọ́n ṣètò gbangba àwọn ipo, àwọn ìbéèrè, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, àti ààbò àwọn ààlà so akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè bẹ̀rẹ̀ nínú ẹ̀tọ́ ibi.

entries.source: The planner prioritizes weak areas, adds review loops, and creates fallback plans for missed days.
entries.value: Ètò náà máa ń fi àwọn kúlẹ̀kúlẹ̀ tí o kò mọ̀ dáadáa ṣáájú, ó máa ń fi àwọn àtúnyẹ̀wò kún un, ó sì máa ń ṣètò ọ̀nà mìíràn fún àwọn ọjọ́ tí o bá pàdánù.

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: Pẹpẹ jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ láti ìrànlọ́wọ́ ènìyàn ìdí, practise, rántí, àti ṣàlàyé àwọn èrò back dípò ti collecting parí àwọn ìdáhùn.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Pẹpẹ worked lórí curriculum gbígbé wọlé, ìrántí, tí a ṣètò ẹ̀kọ́ flows, àti early AI ìkọ́ni àwọn ìrírí.

entries.source: The point is not to flatten two different tools into one winner. The point is to match the learning job to the behavior that helps fastest.
entries.value: Point jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti flatten two different àwọn irinṣẹ́ sí one winner. point jẹ́ láti match iṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ láti ìhùwàsí yẹn ràn lọ́wọ́ fastest.

entries.source: The point is not to make every lesson a puzzle. The point is to choose the right amount of struggle.
entries.value: Point jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti ṣe gbogbo lesson puzzle. point jẹ́ láti yan ẹ̀tọ́ amount ti sapá.

entries.source: The point is not to use AI less. It is to use it in a way that leaves you with stronger understanding after the session.
entries.value: Point jẹ́ kì í ṣe láti lo AI kéré síi. ó jẹ́ láti lo ó nínú way yẹn leaves ìwọ pẹ̀lú lágbára síi ìlóye lẹ́yìn ìpàdé.

entries.source: The practical trust layer behind guest mode.
entries.value: Wúlò trust ìpele lẹ́yìn ipo àlejò.

entries.source: The product should teach, not just answer.
entries.value: Ọja yẹ kí teach, kì í ṣe kan ìdáhùn.

entries.source: The promise is not that AI can summon the past. It cannot. The promise is that roleplay can make context easier to question, compare, and remember when the experience is clearly separated from evidence.
entries.value: Promise jẹ́ kì í ṣe yẹn AI lè summon past. ó cannot. promise jẹ́ yẹn ere ipa lè ṣe àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀ easier láti ìbéèrè, fi wé, àti rántí nígbà tí experience jẹ́ clearly separated láti ẹ̀rí.

entries.source: The prompt searches this library is built to answer.
entries.value: Ìbéèrè àwọn ìwádìí yìí ìkàwé jẹ́ tí a kọ́ láti ìdáhùn.

entries.source: The prompts are designed to start active learning loops: explanation, Socratic questioning, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, critique, debate, planning, and review.
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ láti bẹ̀rẹ̀ active àwọn ìyípo ẹ̀kọ́: àlàyé, Socratic questioning, àwọn ìtọ́ni iṣẹ́ ilé, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àtúpalẹ̀, àríyànjiyàn, ìṣètò, àti àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: The public AI chats in this path.
entries.value: Gbangba AI chats nínú yìí ọ̀nà.

entries.source: The public blog contains more than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters connected to live learning modes.
entries.value: Gbangba àkọsílẹ̀ contains síi than 100 àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, ìbéèrè àwọn ìyípo, àti pillar clusters connected láti taara àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́.

entries.source: The public explanation of why inspir exists and why learning access matters.
entries.value: Gbangba àlàyé ti kí nìdí inspir exists àti kí nìdí ẹ̀kọ́ access ṣe pàtàkì.

entries.source: The public inspir platform helps learners practise extracurricular activities and explore ideas. School deployments can be customised around each school’s content, workflows, and student context.
entries.value: Gbangba inspir pẹpẹ ń ràn lọ́wọ́ àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ practise extracurricular activities àti ṣàwárí àwọn èrò. ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ deployments lè be customised yí ká kọọkan ilé-ẹ̀kọ́’s content, àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀.

entries.source: The public modes are designed around learning behavior: hints, Socratic questions, step checks, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, review loops, and active explanation.
entries.value: Gbangba àwọn ipo jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ yí ká ẹ̀kọ́ ìhùwàsí: àwọn ìtọ́ni, Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè, ìgbésẹ̀ àwọn ìṣàyẹ̀wò, àwọn quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, ìdáhùn lórí kíkọ, àtúnyẹ̀wò àwọn ìyípo, àti active àlàyé.

entries.source: The public product gives anyone a place to start while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Gbangba ọja gives anyone ibi láti bẹ̀rẹ̀ nígbà tí ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti alábàáṣiṣẹ́ deployments lè adapt experience fún local nílò.

entries.source: The public product is easy to try first, while schools and partners can explore tailored deployments for community needs.
entries.value: Gbangba ọja jẹ́ easy láti gbìyànjú àkọ́kọ́, nígbà tí schools àti partners lè ṣàwárí tó bá a mu deployments fún àwùjọ nílò.

entries.source: The public product keeps learning easy to try, while schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Gbangba ọja ń pa ẹ̀kọ́ easy láti gbìmọ̀ wò, nígbà tí àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti CSR partners lè ìrànlọ́wọ́ tó bá a mu deployments nígbà tí àwọn àwùjọ nílò ìkọ̀kọ̀, curriculum alignment, tàbí funded ìráyè wọlé.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: Gbangba ọja stays easy láti gbìmọ̀ wò: àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lè land directly lórí ipo ẹ̀kọ́ àti begin gẹ́gẹ́ bí guest. àwọn ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ àti CSR partners lè ìrànlọ́wọ́ tó bá a mu deployments nígbà tí àwọn àwùjọ nílò ìkọ̀kọ̀, curriculum alignment, tàbí ìráyè wọlé tí ràn lówó.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: Gbangba ọja, ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ ọ̀nà, àti content ìkàwé yẹ kí gbogbo point back láti kan náà principle: ẹ̀kọ́ yẹ kí stay active, rọrùn láti dé, àti tó wúlò.

entries.source: The public site is structured like a learning map: live modes for immediate help, subject hubs for search intent, and guides that turn reading into action.
entries.value: Gbangba ojúlé jẹ́ tí a ṣètò like ẹ̀kọ́ máàpù: taara àwọn ipo fún immediate ìrànlọ́wọ́, kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ibùdó fún wá intent, àti àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà yẹn yí reading sí ìgbésẹ̀.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Gbangba statement ti kí nìdí inspir exists àti kí ẹ̀kọ́ ìráyè wọlé means.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: Ìbéèrè jẹ́ kì í ṣe bóyá AI yẹ kí jẹ́ part ti studying. fún many àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ó already jẹ́. dára síi ìbéèrè jẹ́ bóyá irinṣẹ́ jẹ́ helping ìwọ kọ́ ìrántí, judgment, àti confidence, tàbí quietly removing exact sapá yẹn ń mú ẹ̀kọ́ stick.

entries.source: The questions this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Àwọn ìbéèrè yìí ibùdó jẹ́ tí a kọ́ láti ìdáhùn.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Ọ̀nà ìdánwò yìí ń pa àwọn ìdáhùn mọ́ títí tí o ó fi dáhùn, lẹ́yìn náà ó sọ gbogbo àṣìṣe di kókó àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: The right to access, update or to delete the information we have on you; The right of rectification. You have the right to have your information rectified if that information is inaccurate or incomplete; The right to object. You have the right to object to our processing of your Personal Data; The right of restriction. You have the right to request that we restrict the processing of your personal information; The right to data portability. You have the right to be provided with a copy of your Personal Data in a structured, machine-readable and commonly used format; The right to withdraw consent. You also have the right to withdraw your consent at any time where we rely on your consent to process your personal information; Please note that we may ask you to verify your identity before responding to such requests. Please note, we may not able to provide Service without some necessary data. You have the right to complain to a Data Protection Authority about our collection and use of your Personal Data. For more information, please contact your local data protection authority in the European Economic Area (EEA).
entries.value: Ẹ̀tọ́ láti access, update tàbí láti pa rẹ́ ìwífún a ní lórí ìwọ; ẹ̀tọ́ ti rectification. ìwọ ní ẹ̀tọ́ láti ní tirẹ ìwífún rectified bí yẹn ìwífún jẹ́ inaccurate tàbí incomplete; ẹ̀tọ́ láti object. ìwọ ní ẹ̀tọ́ láti object láti wa ṣiṣe ilana ti tirẹ data Ara Ẹni; ẹ̀tọ́ ti restriction. ìwọ ní ẹ̀tọ́ láti request yẹn a dín kù ṣiṣe ilana ti tirẹ ìwífún ara ẹni; ẹ̀tọ́ láti data portability. ìwọ ní ẹ̀tọ́ láti jẹ́ pèsè pẹ̀lú daakọ ti tirẹ data Ara Ẹni nínú tí a ṣètò, machine-readable àti commonly lò fọ́ọ̀mù; ẹ̀tọ́ láti yọkúrò ìyọ̀nda. ìwọ pẹ̀lú ní ẹ̀tọ́ láti yọkúrò tirẹ ìyọ̀nda ní eyikeyii àkókò ibo a rely lórí tirẹ ìyọ̀nda láti ṣe ilana tirẹ ìwífún ara ẹni; Please akọsilẹ̀ yẹn a lè béèrè ìwọ láti jẹ́risi tirẹ identity kí responding láti such àwọn ìbéèrè. Please akọsilẹ̀, a lè kì í ṣe lè láti pèsè iṣẹ́ láìsí díẹ̀ necessary data. ìwọ ní ẹ̀tọ́ láti complain láti data Protection aláṣẹ nípa wa àkójọ àti lo ti tirẹ data Ara Ẹni. fún síi ìwífún, jọ̀wọ́ kan sí tirẹ local data protection aláṣẹ nínú European Economic Area (EEA).

entries.source: The same AI tutor can be a homework hint, a parent-supervised explain-back loop, a teacher evaluation surface, or a self-study coach. The page should make that clear.
entries.value: Kan náà AI olùkọ́ lè jẹ́ iṣẹ́ ilé ìtọ́ni, parent-supervised àlàyé-padà ìyípo, olùkọ́ ìyẹ̀wò fi hàn, tàbí self-ẹ̀kọ́ olùkọ́. ojú-ìwé yẹ kí ṣe yẹn mọ́.

entries.source: The same topic can need a different prompt depending on whether the learner needs an explanation, a hint, a quiz, a debate, or a plan.
entries.value: Kan náà kókó lè nílò different ìbéèrè depending lórí bóyá akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò àlàyé, ìtọ́ni, quiz, àríyànjiyàn, tàbí ṣètò.

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: Second kaadi ń mú akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ retrieve relationship, kì í ṣe simply recognize sentence. dára àwọn kaadi sábà focus lórí one ti wọ̀nyí àwọn iṣẹ́:

entries.source: The second layer is the evidence note. It should say when something is directly documented, widely interpreted, disputed, or reconstructed for learning. This is the part that protects accuracy.
entries.value: Second ìpele jẹ́ ẹ̀rí akọsilẹ̀. ó yẹ kí sọ nígbà tí ohun kan jẹ́ tààrà kọ sílẹ̀, widely interpreted, disputed, tàbí reconstructed fún ẹ̀kọ́. yìí jẹ́ part yẹn protects accuracy.

entries.source: The security of your data is important to us but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
entries.value: Security ti tirẹ data jẹ́ important láti wa ṣùgbọ́n rántí yẹn rárá method ti transmission ju Internet tàbí method ti electronic storage jẹ́ 100% ní ààbò. nígbà tí a sapá láti lo commercially acceptable túmọ̀ sí láti dáàbò bo tirẹ data Ara Ẹni, a cannot guarantee tirẹ̀ absolute security.

entries.source: The self-study challenge is not just finding information. It is choosing the next right action and knowing whether the idea actually stuck.
entries.value: Self-ẹ̀kọ́ challenge jẹ́ kì í ṣe kan finding ìwífún. ó jẹ́ yíyàn tó kàn ẹ̀tọ́ ìgbésẹ̀ àti knowing bóyá èrò gan-an stuck.

entries.source: The SEO system is designed to make useful public learning resources findable while keeping private user material, admin surfaces, and utility routes outside discovery.
entries.value: SEO eto jẹ́ ṣe àpẹrẹ láti ṣe wúlò gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ohun èlò findable nígbà tí keeping ìkọ̀kọ̀ onílo ohun èlò, admin surfaces, àti utility àwọn ọ̀nà lójú òde discovery.

entries.source: The session should follow this loop: {value1}. If the AI skips straight to the finish, ask it to slow down and check your reasoning first.
entries.value: Ìpàdé yẹ kí follow yìí ìyípo: {value1}. bí AI skips straight láti parí, béèrè ó láti slow down àti ṣàyẹ̀wò tirẹ ìrònú àkọ́kọ́.

entries.source: The session should move through explanation, your attempt, feedback, repair, and a short proof of understanding.
entries.value: Ìpàdé yẹ kí lọ nípasẹ̀ àlàyé, tirẹ attempt, ìdáhùn, túnṣe, àti short proof ti ìlóye.

entries.source: The short version: inspir grew from a learning community into a public AI learning product organized around active, mode-specific teaching.
entries.value: Short ẹ̀dà: inspir grew láti àwùjọ ẹ̀kọ́ sí gbangba AI ẹ̀kọ́ ọja ṣètò yí ká active, mode-specific kíkọ́ni.

entries.source: The site is a route, not a brochure.
entries.value: Ojúlé náà jẹ́ ọ̀nà, kì í ṣe brochure.

entries.source: The solution to the world's problems lies in addressing human problems, and the rise of the middle class and the world post-2008 has shown that when people are educated, sheltered, and given the freedom to make choices, they will pursue happiness and greater causes.
entries.value: Solution láti world's problems lies nínú addressing human problems, àti rise ti middle class àti àgbáyé post-2008 ní shown yẹn nígbà tí ènìyàn jẹ́ educated, sheltered, àti given freedom láti ṣe àwọn yíyàn, wọ́n máa lépa ayọ̀ àti greater àwọn ìdí.

entries.value: Source àwọn ìjápọ̀ wá àwọn eto àti schools lè inspect.

entries.source: The story of inspir, from public quizzes and student communities to free AI learning tools built in public.
entries.value: Story ti inspir, láti gbangba àwọn quiz àti akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ àwọn àwùjọ láti ọ̀fẹ́ àwọn irinṣẹ́ ẹ̀kọ́ AI tí a kọ́ nínú gbangba.

entries.source: The story spans quizzes, offline school networks, curriculum ingestion, and public AI learning modes.
entries.value: Ìtàn-àròsọ spans àwọn quiz, offline ilé-ẹ̀kọ́ networks, curriculum gbígbé wọlé, àti gbangba àwọn ipo ẹ̀kọ́ AI.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Lágbára jù angle jẹ́ ọ̀fẹ́ gbangba AI ẹ̀kọ́ yẹn opens tààrà nínú ipo àlejò àti ń pa àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ active nípasẹ̀ mode-specific kíkọ́ni dípò gbogbogbò ìdáhùn iran.

entries.source: The strongest proof of the mission is not a claim on a page. It is the public learning surface: guest modes, study paths, long-form guides, and school pathways that connect back to real learner needs.
entries.value: Lágbára jù proof ti iṣẹ́ àfojúsùn jẹ́ kì í ṣe ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́ lórí ojú-ìwé. ó jẹ́ gbangba ẹ̀kọ́ fi hàn: àwọn ipo àlejò, ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ọ̀nà, long-form àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti school pathways yẹn so pọ̀ back láti gidi akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ nílò.

entries.source: The strongest questions are not trivia questions. They are context questions.
entries.value: Lágbára jù àwọn ìbéèrè jẹ́ kì í ṣe trivia àwọn ìbéèrè. wọ́n jẹ́ àyíká-ọ̀rọ̀ àwọn ìbéèrè.

entries.source: The strongest SEO pages do not strand a learner. They connect the audience intent to paths, workflows, guides, and repeatable review.
entries.value: Lágbára jù SEO àwọn ojú-ìwé ṣe kì í ṣe strand akẹ́kọ̀ọ́. wọ́n so pọ̀ olùgbọ́ intent láti àwọn ọ̀nà, àwọn ìṣàn iṣẹ́, àwọn ìtọ́sọ́nà, àti repeatable àtúnyẹ̀wò.

entries.source: The strongest student workflow is not answer-copying. It is a loop: explain the stuck point, ask one better question, get a hint, try again, then review the miss.
entries.value: Lágbára jù akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ ìṣàn iṣẹ́ jẹ́ kì í ṣe answer-copying. ó jẹ́ ìyípo: ṣàlàyé stuck point, béèrè one dára síi ìbéèrè, gba ìtọ́ni, gbìyànjú again, lẹ́yìn náà àtúnyẹ̀wò fojú kọ.

entries.source: The subject hub links directly to focused chat entrypoints such as Math Step Coach and Writing Coach.
entries.value: Kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ ibùdó àwọn ìjápọ̀ directly láti tó dojú kọ chat àwọn ẹnu-ọ̀nà such gẹ́gẹ́ bí ìṣirò Step olùkọ́ àti kíkọ olùkọ́.

entries.source: The subject searches this hub is built to answer.
entries.value: Kókó-ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ìwádìí yìí ibùdó jẹ́ tí a kọ́ láti ìdáhùn.

entries.source: The terms that describe acceptable use, account responsibilities, and public service conditions for inspir.
entries.value: Àwọn òfin yẹn describe acceptable lo, àkọọlẹ̀ responsibilities, àti gbangba iṣẹ́ àwọn ìpinnu fún inspir.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: Transfer ìgbésẹ̀ jẹ́ pàtàkì. bí ìwọ lè nìkan solve exact ìṣòro AI kan walked nípasẹ̀, ìwọ ní learned àpẹẹrẹ. bí ìwọ lè solve cousin ti ìṣòro, ìwọ jẹ́ starting láti kọ́ èrò.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ náà ń béèrè ìbéèrè kan ní ẹ̀kan ṣoṣo, ó ń dúró de ìrònú rẹ, ó sì ń ṣàkópọ̀ rẹ̀ lẹ́yìn tí o ti gbìyànjú.

entries.source: The tutor asks what you expect code to do, then uses small examples and tests to make the behavior click.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ náà yóò béèrè ohun tí o retí pé kí kọ̀ǹpútà náà ṣe, lẹ́yìn náà yóò lo àwọn àpẹẹrẹ kéékèèké àti àwọn ìdánwò láti jẹ́ kí ó yé ọ dáadáa.

entries.source: The tutor translates abstract material into story structure while keeping the underlying concept visible.
entries.value: Olùkọ́ náà yí àwọn ohun èlò tí ó ṣòro láti lóye padà sí ètò ìtàn nígbà tí ó ń jẹ́ kí èrò náà wà ní àkíyèsí.

entries.source: The usage of the Platform is free of cost and the Company is not charging any fees for usage of Platform. However, Users shall be liable to pay fees for the Course which User desires to subscribe (“Fees”). Payment against fees can be made online through credit Card/internet banking etc. or any mode of payment which is made available to the User in the Platform. Users are required to pay for competitions hosted on the platform based on the cost for the particular competition.
entries.value: Usage ti pẹpẹ jẹ́ ọ̀fẹ́ ti cost àti ilé-iṣẹ́ jẹ́ kì í ṣe charging eyikeyii owó iṣẹ́ fún usage ti pẹpẹ. However, àwọn onílo yóò jẹ́ liable láti pay owó iṣẹ́ fún Course èyí wo onílo desires láti forúkọsílẹ̀ (“owó iṣẹ́”). ìsanwó against owó iṣẹ́ lè jẹ́ ṣe online nípasẹ̀ credit kaadi/internet banking etc. tàbí eyikeyii ipo ti ìsanwó èyí wo jẹ́ ṣe wà láti onílo nínú pẹpẹ. àwọn onílo jẹ́ ní dandan láti pay fún competitions hosted lórí pẹpẹ based lórí cost fún particular competition.

entries.source: The writing route keeps feedback specific. It favors revision priorities, explain-back, reading comprehension, source checks, and speaking practice over a full rewrite.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Lẹ́yìn náà fi kún constraint yẹn ń mú ìpàdé síi ti ara ẹni:

entries.source: There was something the world discovered during this time, Google first showed the world the realistic application of the same. When for the first time people were identified based on behaviour and not identity. The realisation is that regardless of the identity that you subscribe to, your inherent behaviour is created by the society and environment around you.
entries.value: There jẹ́ ohun kan àgbáyé discovered during yìí àkókò, Google àkọ́kọ́ fi hàn àgbáyé bá ayé mu application ti kan náà. nígbà tí fún àkọ́kọ́ àkókò ènìyàn jẹ́ identified based lórí behaviour àti kì í ṣe identity. realisation jẹ́ yẹn láìka ti identity yẹn ìwọ forúkọsílẹ̀ láti, tirẹ inherent behaviour jẹ́ created nípasẹ̀ society àti environment yí ká ìwọ.

entries.source: These questions help the learner see history as a set of pressures and interpretations rather than a costume drama. They also keep the AI honest. The more the learner asks about evidence, limits, and perspective, the less likely the session is to become fantasy wearing a famous name.

entries.source: This is not a claim that learners should abandon Khan Academy. For many topics, a trusted lesson library and a live AI learning mode work best together: learn the foundation, then use inspir to ask questions, repair confusion, practise recall, or get unstuck.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kì í ṣe ẹ̀sùn ìdájọ́ yẹn àwọn akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ yẹ kí abandon Khan Academy. fún many àwọn kókó, trusted lesson ìkàwé àti taara Ipo Ẹ̀kọ́ AI iṣẹ́ tó dára jù papọ̀: kọ́ foundation, lẹ́yìn náà lo inspir láti béèrè àwọn ìbéèrè, túnṣe confusion, practise recall, tàbí gba unstuck.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kan náà ìṣe àṣà lẹ́yìn studying pẹ̀lú AI láìsí jìyà ara rẹ: pa mọ́ akẹ́kọ̀ọ́ active. AI jẹ́ jù wúlò nígbà tí ó gives ìwọ ìdáhùn lórí tirẹ thinking.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Yìí jẹ́ kí nìdí inspir jẹ́ tí a kọ́ yí ká ẹ̀kọ́ àwọn ipo. Sometimes ìwọ nílò mọ́ àlàyé. Sometimes ìwọ nílò Socratic àwọn ìbéèrè. Sometimes ìwọ nílò quiz, àwọn kaadi ìrántí, àríyànjiyàn adaṣe, kíkọ olùkọ́, tàbí historical ere ipa.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Yìí ṣe pàtàkì fún schools àti àwọn ẹbí nítorí pé àkọ́kọ́ barrier jẹ́ often kì í ṣe talent. ó jẹ́ cost ti ìrànlọ́wọ́, fear ti bíbéèrè "basic" ìbéèrè, tàbí lack ti sùúrù ènìyàn ní exact àsìkò confusion appears. ọ̀fẹ́ gbangba alábàákẹ́kọ̀ọ́ lowers cost ti beginning.
